text: Railways Pension Trustee Company increases indicative offer from 69.7p to 71.6p plus CVR
Board reiterates "unequivocal rejection" of Brave Bison's proposal
Shareholders Fidelity International (6.9%) & Aviva Investors (2.2%) tell press they will not accept increased proposal
AEW UK REIT plc's PUSU deadline changed from 13 August to 28 August
